problems.title: Number of Islands
problems.prompt: Given an m x n 2D binary grid grid which represents a map of '1' (land) and '0' (water), return the number of islands. An island is surrounded by water and is formed by connecting adjacent lands horizontally or vertically.

problems.title: Clone Graph Problem
problems.prompt: Given a reference of a node in a connected undirected graph, return a deep copy (clone) of the graph. Each node contains an integer val and a list of neighbors.
constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [0, 100]
Node.val is unique for each node

problems.title: Course Schedule
problems.prompt: There are numCourses courses labeled from 0 to numCourses - 1. You are given an array prerequisites where prerequisites[i] = [ai, bi] means you must take course bi before course ai. Return true if you can finish all courses. Otherwise return false.

problems.title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow (Lite)
problems.prompt: Given an m x n matrix of non-negative integers heights representing the height of each cell, return a list of grid coordinates [r, c] where rain water can flow to both the Pacific and Atlantic oceans. Water can flow to adjacent cells (4 directions) of equal or lower height. Pacific touches the top and left edges; Atlantic touches the bottom and right edges.

problems.title: Word Ladder (Lite)
problems.prompt: Given two words beginWord and endWord, and a word list wordList, return the number of words in the shortest transformation sequence from beginWord to endWord, or 0 if no such sequence exists. Each transformed word must exist in wordList (except beginWord). Only one letter can be changed at a time.

problems.title: Network Delay Time
problems.prompt: You are given a network of n nodes labeled from 1 to n. You are given times, a list of travel times as directed edges times[i] = (ui, vi, wi), where ui is the source, vi is the target, and wi is the time it takes. We send a signal from node k. Return the minimum time it takes for all n nodes to receive the signal. If impossible, return -1.

problems.title: Cheapest Flights Within K Stops
problems.prompt: There are n cities connected by some number of flights. You are given an array flights where flights[i] = [fromi, toi, pricei]. Find the cheapest price from src to dst with at most k stops. If there is no such route, return -1.

problems.title: Critical Connections
problems.prompt: There are n servers numbered from 0 to n - 1 connected by undirected server-to-server connections, where connections[i] = [ai, bi] represents a connection between servers ai and bi. A critical connection is a connection whose removal will make some servers unable to reach some other server (a bridge). Return all critical connections in any order.
